name: Perla 2pk Acacia Wood Patio Dining Chairs - Teak/Green - Christopher Knight Home
description: If you are on the hunt for more dining chars for your patio set, than look no further than these wooden armed chairs. With a sturdy frame and clean wood line, these dining chairs are a must have. The water resistant fabric of the cushions will stand up to the little messes of life, allowing you to use these chairs to the fullest extent.
